programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: The Gravest Military Mistakes In History- Tin Soldiers
programme.desc: 20th Century beliefs that a new military technology would bring about cleaner wars and reduce casualties are confounded in this look at modern warfare from the Battle of the Somme to the Gulf War

programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.desc: When Schanke becomes the target of an avenging assassin Nick races the clock to save his partner

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A man with a fear of the dark accepts a job working in the dark sewers of Springwood And a video store clerk keeps having nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick suspects a cover-up in the attempted rape of a police captains wife and her subsequent shooting of the attacker

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: Mchale 230
programme.desc: Mchale 230

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An unattractive and lovelorn woman named Eva Grubb comes to the island to escape civilization and offers the castaways her boat But before they can leave the women give her a makeover and turn her into a Ginger Grant lookalike

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hymie is introduced to CONTROL as KAOS tries to kidnap a CONTROL scientist

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Herculoids
programme.desc: Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget interrupts his holiday in Hawaii to stop MAD from turning it into their latest missile base by pretending that an ancient volcano is still active

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: An Eagle is sent onto the surface of the planet Psychon which has titanium needed for repairs to the Alpha Base It fails to return and is used by Psychon scientist Mentor as bait with which to entice other members of the Alphan crew onto the planet Mentor is building a biological computer that will hopefully transform his deteriorating planet back into the Eden it once was However the machine can only be fueled by the living brains of humans and Mentor has his eye on those of the Alphan crew Fortunately Mentor is not alone on the planet; his innocent daughter the shape-shifting Maya is unaware of her fathers plans so Koenig tries to convince her to side with the Alphans

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While Boone is haunted by hallucinations of captain Lucas Johnson the Taelon Rhoha is to undergo a experiment of experiencing human emotions

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The remaining members of the team set up a new home and try to deal with their grief The Morthren also have to find a fresh refuge and as part of this they kidnap and duplicate a priest who runs a homeless shelter

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Chris McMillan as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain search for a seismologist that MAD has kidnapped for their evil blackmail plot

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades beam the Guardians into a parallel universe where the unwitting Leader-1 and Scooter fight evil Guardians and ally with the good Cy-Kill Crasher and Cop-Tur

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Steamer defects to the Guardians but theyre suspicious when he reveals Cy-Kills new scheme to overthrow Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss and Monster Minds are blocking sunlight to a planet making it too cold for that planets defensive humruns large bugs to be capable of fighting and eating the Monster Mind vines Jayce and Oon are imprisoned by the native people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During the ceremony of Matt Trakkers honorary knighthood two yeoman warders are suddenly attacked by ravens Vanessa Warfield has been training them to be used in a crown jewel heist

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Times Up

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Shattered Crystal

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever
